steps.title: Use the direct explanation
steps.content: The passage states that the kiwikiu became highly specialized as it adapted to survive in a specific island habitat. That sentence directly explains why the species is specialized.

steps.title: Reject unsupported causes
steps.content: A adds the idea of the most isolated locations, C adds sharing habitat with other specialized birds, and D confuses vulnerability to stressors with the cause of specialization. The cause given is adaptation to a specific Hawaiian habitat. The answer is B.
